mapper.select: SELECT trade_id, settlement_type, spot_rate, customer_rate, cost_rate, currency1_account, currency2_account, margin_account_id, margin_amount, amount FROM fx_spot_trade WHERE trade_id = #{tradeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fx_spot_trade (trade_id, settlement_type, spot_rate, customer_rate, cost_rate, currency1_account, currency2_account, margin_account_id, margin_amount, amount) VALUES (#{tradeId}, #{settlementType}, #{spotRate}, #{customerRate}, #{costRate}, #{currency1Account}, #{currency2Account}, #{marginAccountId}, #{marginAmount}, #{amount})
